Home / Service Areas / Durham

Landscaping company in Durham, NC

Trusted local professionals serving Durham and surrounding communities

Serving Durham, NC

Two Brothers Landscaping, LLC is proud to offer our full range of landscaping services to the residents and businesses of Durham, North Carolina. From the revitalized downtown area with its renovated industrial lofts to the established neighborhoods surrounding Duke University, we understand the diverse landscaping needs of this vibrant city. We're committed to providing top-quality lawn care, landscape design, and hardscaping services to enhance the beauty and value of your Durham property. Our team is experienced in working with the specific challenges and opportunities presented by Durham's climate, including hot, humid summers. We can help you select and maintain plants that thrive in our region, ensuring a beautiful and sustainable landscape year-round. Whether you need routine lawn maintenance, a complete landscape renovation, or help with irrigation and drainage, Two Brothers Landscaping is here to serve you. We also understand the importance of preserving Durham's unique character. We work closely with our clients to create landscapes that complement the architectural style of their homes and businesses, while also reflecting their personal tastes and preferences.

Durham is known for its thriving arts and culture scene, historic tobacco warehouses converted into lofts, and its proximity to Research Triangle Park.
